caption:
The Kurodake ropeway has been carrying skiers up from Sounkyo since 1967. No queue barriers, no fuss — an old green cable car, a cliff face in the fog, and hardly another group in sight.

Skiing in Japan isn't only about the snow. It's onsen villages buried in it, lifts with more history than most resorts, and mountains that stay quiet all day.

We build our weeks around places like this. Curious? Send us a message.

#hokkaido #daisetsuzan #kurodake #sounkyo #japow #japanskiing #skitouring
